skills.name: parse_natural_language_request
skills.description: Extract structured intent from a free-form user request
skills.limits: Does not make file system calls

skills.name: detect_component_references
skills.description: Identify component names mentioned in a user request
skills.limits: Returns empty array if none found

skills.name: map_scope_to_domain
skills.description: Map a goal string to a scope enum value

skills.name: search_patterns_by_use_case
skills.description: Find applicable patterns in src/components/ for a given use case
skills.limits: Returns empty array if no patterns found

skills.name: resolve_component_by_name
skills.description: Check if a named component exists in src/components/ and find its Base UI primitive

skills.name: extract_semantic_tokens
skills.description: Extract relevant semantic tokens from src/tokens/ for a given component scope
skills.limits: Only returns CSS custom property references

skills.name: load_project_rules
skills.description: Load naming conventions and file structure rules from .hive/rules/ and CLAUDE.md
skills.limits: Returns empty object if no rule files found

skills.name: find_usage_examples
skills.description: Find .stories.tsx files and usage examples for a given component

skills.name: compose_component_blueprint
skills.description: Build a structured component blueprint from ground context

skills.name: generate_prop_interface
skills.description: Generate a TypeScript prop interface from blueprint and ground context

output_schema.props: array of { name, type, required, description }

skills.limits: Extends Base UI prop types; does not invent APIs

skills.name: map_tokens_to_props
skills.description: Map semantic tokens to component visual properties
skills.limits: Only uses tokens present in ground.tokens

skills.name: check_token_usage
skills.description: Verify all color/spacing values in a blueprint are semantic token references

skills.name: validate_prop_types
skills.description: Validate TypeScript prop types in the blueprint are correct and complete
skills.limits: Static analysis only; does not compile

skills.name: audit_accessibility
skills.description: Check blueprint for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance, ARIA correctness, and keyboard nav
skills.limits: Structural analysis only; not a browser-based axe run

skills.name: lint_naming_conventions
skills.description: Check component name, file paths, and prop names against project rules

skills.name: write_component_file
skills.description: Write a React component .tsx file from a verified blueprint
skills.limits: Confirms with user before overwriting existing files

skills.name: write_stories_file
skills.description: Write a Storybook .stories.tsx file from blueprint variants
skills.limits: Requires at least a Default story

skills.name: update_index_exports
skills.description: Add a new export to src/index.ts and write the component barrel index.ts

skills.name: format_code
skills.description: Run Prettier on generated files and verify TypeScript compilation
skills.limits: Does not modify code beyond formatting
